descriptions: Causeway Gang listed as an ally of Tottenham Mandem in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Broadwater Farm Posse, Burger Bar Boys, Causeway Gang, Edmonton Firm (also known as The Firm, Edmonton Mandem, or EMD), Star Gang

Zulu Warriors.description: The Zulu Warriors are a football hooligan firm associated with Birmingham City F.C., formed in 1982 from an amalgamation of other firms including Apex. They are known for their multi-ethnic membership, contrasting with many other firms. Their main rivals are Aston Villa fans, and they have been involved in numerous violent clashes. The firm remains active in football-related disorder.

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore has clashed with Zulu Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hardcore have clashed a number of times with the Zulu Warriors, associated with Aston Villa's fiercest rivals Birmingham City.

descriptions: Zulu Warriors formed from amalgamation of Apex and other firms.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors were formed in 1982 out of an amalgamation of other Birmingham City firms including Apex.

descriptions: Brew Crew is an offshoot gang of the Zulu Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors have also seen offshoot gangs created such as the Brew Crew and the Junior Business Boys

descriptions: Junior Business Boys is an offshoot gang of the Zulu Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors have also seen offshoot gangs created such as the Brew Crew and the Junior Business Boys

descriptions: The Semion Mogilevich organization's business is often connected with the Vyacheslav Ivankov Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Its business is often connected with that of the Solntsevskaya Bratva and the Vyacheslav Ivankov Organization.

descriptions: Bishnoi Gang killed a member of Khalistan Tiger Force.
edges.evidence_quote: Bishnoi's associates murdered Sukhdool Singh Gill, a member of the pro-Khalistani Khalistan Tiger Force, considered a terrorist organization by India.

descriptions: Bishnoi gang is listed as a rival of Brothers Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Red Scorpions , United Nations , Kang crime family(BIBO gang) , Bishnoi gang

descriptions: Diablos member Raymond Stone confessed to the 1992 murder of a James Gang MC member, indicating a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Stone's confession in his involvement in the 1992 murder of rival gang member Mike D'Amato of Wallingford, Connecticut's James Gang MC

descriptions: Redd Alert may have originated as an offshoot of Edmonton Northside Boys, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Details on their origin are unclear but some reports say they originated as an offshoot of the Edmonton Northside Boys.

Puente 13.description: Puente 13 is a Sureño street gang based in La Puente, California, founded around 1953 as the Bridgetown Gentlemen. It is affiliated with the Mexican Mafia and known for drug trafficking, fraud, murder, and assault. The gang claims the entire city of La Puente and operates in the San Gabriel Valley.

descriptions: Azusa 13 is a rival of Puente 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Azusa 13

descriptions: Puente 13 is allied with and contributes to the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: adding the "-13" that signifies allegiance to the Mexican Mafia

descriptions: Townsmen 13 is a rival of Puente 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Townsmen 13

descriptions: Infobox lists Syndicate Motorcycle Club as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels Motorcycle Club Syndicate Motorcycle Club

descriptions: A former Mau Maus member founded and led the Vampires.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvador Agrón, a member of the Mau Maus, later led another gang called the Vampires

La Corporación.description: Bolivian drug cartel founded in the 1970s by Roberto Suárez Gómez, known as the 'King of Cocaine'. It became one of the world's largest cocaine producers after the 1980 coup, receiving political protection from the military dictatorship. The cartel supplied the Medellín Cartel and was active until the early 1990s.

descriptions: La Corporación is listed as an ally of Medellín Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Muerte a Secuestradores , Guadalajara Cartel (defunct) , The Extraditables (defunct) , La Corporación (defunct) , Oficina de Envigado , Los Priscos (defunct) , Gallón Gang (defunct) , Galician clans , Gulf Cartel , Nicaragua (alleged) , Cuba (alleged) , Panama (alleged, under Manuel Noriega )

descriptions: The infobox lists La Corporación as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Corporación

descriptions: La Corporación supplied cocaine to the Medellín Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Because of the relationship with Suárez and Pablo Escobar, "La Corporación" became a major supplier to the Medellín Cartel.

descriptions: La Corporación had La Conexión as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: DEA, Bolivian constitutional government, La Conexión

descriptions: Santa Cruz Cartel has La Corporación as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Corporación , Bolivian government

descriptions: Noua Dreaptă claims to be the successor of the Iron Guard.
edges.evidence_quote: The party claims to be the successor to the far-right Iron Guard

descriptions: JI was allied with LTTE until 2009 according to infobox.

descriptions: LTTE conducted arms transfers and made deals with LeT in the early 1990s.

descriptions: Bandidos member killed a Red Chiefs member in a road incident.
edges.evidence_quote: Crawford, a member of the Red Chiefs Motorcycle Club, was dragged underneath the van for nearly a kilometre on the A38 at Plymouth.

The Johnson Gang.description: A group of Romanichal criminals from Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, who specialized in stealing fine art and antiques from English country houses over 20 years. The gang stole goods worth an estimated £30-80 million and were sentenced to a total of 49 years in prison in August 2008. Members included Ricky Johnson, his sons Richard and Albi, nephew Daniel O'Loughlin, and Michael Nicholls.

descriptions: AK81 lists Black Scorpions as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Immigrant gangs (especially the gang from Blågårdsplads): Black Cobra , Black Scorpions, Loyal to Familia , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra controls the Black Scorpions youth gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang also control a youth gang called the Black Scorpions.

descriptions: The Terrible West Siders is a rival of The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang, Mongrels, Young Gifteds and Terrible Josters.

Los Charlines.description: Galician drug trafficking clan founded in 1975 by Manuel Charlín Gama and his family. Based in Galicia, Spain, they engaged in smuggling of food, tobacco, hashish, and later cocaine and heroin. The clan was dismantled in Operation Nécora in 1990 but continued operations, with members serving prison sentences. They are considered one of the most important drug trafficking clans in Galicia.

descriptions: Los Charlines are allied with the Cali Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Clan del Golfo , Corleonesi clan , Nuova Camorra Organizzata , Sinaloa Cartel

A.F.C.A.description: A Dutch hooligan firm linked to AFC Ajax, based in Amsterdam. It consists of multiple subgroups such as F-side, VAK410, and others, which cooperate during riots. The firm is involved in football hooliganism, riots, fighting, arson, and drug trafficking. It has allies and rivals among other European hooligan groups.

'Ndrina Critelli.description: The Critelli are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cariati, Calabria, active in the province of Cosenza, Emilia-Romagna, and Germany. They are involved in extortion, money laundering, drug trafficking, usury, and murder. They are allied with 'ndrine from the upper Ionian coast. The group has been targeted in several police operations including 'Galassia', 'Reset 2', and 'Rheinbrücke'.

descriptions: The Carelli are allied with the Critelli di Cariati.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con gli zingari di Lauropoli e con i Critelli di Cariati.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Critelli is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Critelli sono una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cariati

descriptions: Banda della Magliana agreed to finance Costruiamo l'azione in exchange for favorable psychiatric evaluations.

descriptions: Scattered Spider collaborated with ALPHV for ransomware operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Scattered Spider collaborated with ALPHV , a software development team which provides ransomware as a service.

descriptions: The two gangs were engaged in a violent rivalry over caste conflict and control of resources.
edges.evidence_quote: The rivalry between Mahto and gangster Akhilesh Singh affected over 100 villages in the Nawada, Nalanda and Sheikhpura districts of Bihar.
